title: Avatar: Legend Reforged
description: An "Avatar: The Last Airbender" inspired Minecraft mod with realistic bending
body: # Avatar: Legend Reforged This is an "Avatar: The Last Airbender" inspired Minecraft mod boasting versatile combat and ambitious dynamic bending. The goal of this project is to provide a more immersive bending experience than ever before. Bending the elements is based on mastering the basic Forms and learning to use them in combination to achieve a number of feats. Video Clips: * [https://imgur.com/8QaPmq9](https://imgur.com/8QaPmq9) * [https://imgur.com/wmeeASO](https://imgur.com/wmeeASO) *** ## Quick Start Guide ### Step 1: Select Your Element Press the **period (`.`)** key to open the Element Selection Screen. Choose from: * **Airbending** * **Waterbending** * **Earthbending** * **Firebending** Once selected, you become a Bender with access to that element's skills. ### Step 2: Toggle Bending On/Off Press **Period (`.`)** again to toggle bending mode on and off. When enabled, you can execute bending skills using the Bending Forms below. ### Step 3: Master the Bending Forms Bending Forms are the foundation of all bending skills. Each Form maps to a default key binding. Press or hold the corresponding key to execute a skill associated with that Form. | Form |Default Key |Action | | -------- |------------------ |------------------------------- | | STRIKE |Left Mouse Button |Primary offensive attack | | BLOCK |Right Mouse Button |Defensive barrier or protection | | PUSH |W |Forward directional force | | PULL |S |Backward/inward force | | LEFT |A |Left directional force | | RIGHT |D |Right directional force | | RAISE |E |Upward/elevating force | | LOWER |Q |Downward/descending force | | ROTATE |R |Rotational/circular motion | | EXPAND |E |Enlargement or spreading | | COMPRESS |Q |Compression or condensing | | SPLIT |S |Separation or division | | COMBINE |W |Merging or joining | | ARC |Left Ctrl |Curved trajectory | | SHAPE |Left Alt |Shaping or molding | | STEP |W/A/S/D + Space (double tap) |Dashing movement | ### Step 4: Execute Bending Skills To execute a bending skill, press the corresponding Bending Form key\*\* for the skill you want to use. For example, to use **Fire Strike**, simply press `Left Mouse Button` (STRIKE Form). Your character will launch a curvable fire projectile. ### Step 5: Combine Forms for Advanced Skills Some skills require multiple Forms in sequence. For example, **Flame Stream** requires: 1. Press `Left Alt` (SHAPE) 2. Then, press `E` (EXPAND) 3. Finally, hold `Right Mouse Button` (BLOCK) This combination allows you to continuously fire projectiles. *** ## 📚 Learn More See full list of Bending Skills and how to execute them here: [Bending Skills](https://github.com/MorpheTech/AvatarModWiki/wiki/Bending-Skills) *** 💡 Pro Tip - **Master one element first** - Learn all skills of a single element before switching *** Please be aware this mod is a work in progress and we plan on adding more content like progression, NPCs, structure generation and more! Please provide feedback and join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/amuzil-avatar)!
